---
title: "Educational"
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/educational/related-topics/neural_ntworks/math_bihind_nn.ipynb"
    - "posts/educational/related-topics/parametric-estimates.ipynb"
    - "posts/educational/related-topics/sklearn-bybit-tutorial.ipynb"
    - "posts/educational/related-topics/lagutin-statistical-experiments.ipynb"
    - "posts/educational/related-topics/component-analysis.ipynb"
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 3
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true
  filter-ui: true
  sort-ui: [date, title]
  image-placeholder: "assets/research-placeholder-pencil.png"
page-layout: full
---

All current research notebooks, tutorials, and mathematical foundations that support trading research and quantitative analysis.
